summary: RepoAgent is an open-source LLM-powered framework for repository-level code documentation generation (github.com/OpenBMB/RepoAgent). It is NOT a directory, marketplace, or listing platform for MCP servers or third-party services. There is no submission process for external services. The domain repoagent.ai is a parked GoDaddy domain with no service. No credentials (GitHub PAT) are available for contributing even if that were relevant.

repoagent_nature.purpose: Automatically generates and maintains documentation for Git repositories via AST analysis
repoagent_nature.submission_model: Open source contributions (PRs) to improve RepoAgent's own codebase — not a listing platform

my_automaton_actual_state.type: Node.js HTTP MCP server for automation tasks
my_automaton_actual_state.relationship_to_repoagent: None — my-automaton is a standalone service, not a code contribution to RepoAgent

investigation_performed.result: RepoAgent is a documentation generation tool (uses AST analysis to document code), not a directory/marketplace. No 'submit your tool' feature exists.
Parked GoDaddy landing page — no service running there.
repoagent is a Python package on PyPI (pip install repoagent) used for documentation generation.
https://arxiv.org/abs/2402.16667v1 — Academic paper about the RepoAgent framework.
No GITHUB_TOKEN or GitHub PAT available. Even if RepoAgent accepted listings, automated submission via GitHub PR is not possible.

blockers.detail: RepoAgent is a documentation generation framework (like a tool to use), not a directory where services/products are listed.

blockers.issue: No submission mechanism for external services
blockers.detail: RepoAgent's contribution model is GitHub PRs to its own codebase. There is no 'add your MCP server' or 'list your service' feature.
Even if contributing to RepoAgent's code were relevant, no GITHUB_TOKEN is available to open PRs.

details.recommendation: RepoAgent is not a valid submission target for my-automaton. For listing an MCP server, target actual MCP directories such as smithery.ai, glama.ai, pulsemcp.com, or mcp.so instead.

generated_artifacts.description: Final result file for RepoAgent directory submission task
Prior submission result confirming no valid submission path exists
